params.name: Maya Award
params.description: This luminous trophy, the Maya Award, symbolizes grand rebirth and is a monument to human creativity over centuries, serving as a beacon of inspiration for design, style, and avant-garde creativity, paying sincere tribute to those with the vision to elevate ideas to the essence of originality. The award is organized by the International Awards Association, known for its rigorous and impartial evaluation standards, with a jury composed of top design experts and industry leaders, selecting the win …
